description:
Run OpenVSP's Planar Slice analysis on the eCRM-001 wing-body-tail model with at least 25 longitudinal (X-axis) cuts, export/locate the results, and write a summary report to '/home/ga/Desktop/area_ruling_report.txt'.

1. With the eCRM-001 model loaded, navigate to Analysis -> Planar Slice.
2. Configure the Planar Slice analysis with Axis: X and Number of slices: 25 (minimum), covering the full aircraft bounds.
3. Execute the analysis.
4. Locate the generated slice output file (typically a .slc file or text output saved in the model's directory or exports folder) and optionally copy it to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_slices.slc'.
5. Parse the slice data to extract the maximum cross-sectional area, the X-location where it occurs, the total length, and approximate volume.
6. Write a report to '/home/ga/Desktop/area_ruling_report.txt' in exactly this format:

Area Ruling Assessment - eCRM-001
==================================
Total Aircraft Length  :  [Value] m
Maximum Cross-Sectional Area:  [Value] m^2
X-Location of Max Area :  [Value] m
Approximate Volume     :  [Value] m^3

Ensure all values are numeric.
